reviews.comment:
Mala atencion de los plalleros tardan mucho tiempo para atender ni te saludan voy porque tengo descuento aca y IPf pero cuando tardan mas de 20minutos me voy a 5 cuadras shell un poco mas caro pero buena atencion

(Translated by Google)
The staff are terrible; they take forever to serve you and don't even greet you. I go because I have a discount here and an IPf, but when they take more than 20 minutes, I go to a Shell station five blocks away. It's a little more expensive, but the service is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5bWV2MWp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena organización en el servicio. A contrario de lo que ocurre en el ACA de Godoy Cruz que es desastroso. Ojalá alguien haga algo.

(Translated by Google)
Good organization at the service center. Unlike the ACA in Godoy Cruz, which is disastrous. I hope someone does something about it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5X3NMSmpRRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
El ACA siempre tiene eficiente atención aunque por esa misma razón es raro que no haya que esperar un buen rato para ser atendido...no es grave

(Translated by Google)
The ACA always provides efficient service, although for that very reason it is rare that you don't have to wait a while to be seen...it's not serious.
